Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: complete Phases 2-6 implementation with full frontend integration

This commit includes all missing implementations from Phases 2-6:

PHASE 2: Financials & Feedback Loop
Backend:
- PaymentsService with INITIAL_PAYMENT, INVOICE, EMPLOYEE_PAYMENT types
- Payment tracking with methods \(TRANSFER, CHECK\)
- FeedbackService with cycle management and 12PM rule
Frontend:
- RecordPaymentModal for initial and employee payments
- PaymentHistoryTable with comprehensive payment history
- PaymentMethodSelect component
- FeedbackThread for chat-like feedback display
- FeedbackTimeline for cycle visualization
- Payment history page \(/dashboard/projects/[id]/payments\)
- Feedback page \(/dashboard/projects/[id]/feedback\)

PHASE 3: Versioning & Time Tracking
Backend:
- FileVersionService for version management
- TimeTrackingService with start/end tracking
- Version lineage support \(parentFileId, versionNumber\)
- Rejection tracking \(rejectionCount, lastRejectedAt\)
Frontend:
- FileVersionHistoryModal showing version lineage
- UploadNewVersionModal for new version uploads
- TimeTrackingCharts with duration and efficiency metrics
- Version history integration in FileList

PHASE 4: Analytics & Invoicing
Backend:
- InvoicesService with DRAFT, SENT, PAID, OVERDUE, CANCELLED statuses
- AnalyticsService for business intelligence
- Invoice management with payment terms
Frontend:
- Invoice list page \(/dashboard/admin/invoices\)
- Invoice detail page \(/dashboard/admin/invoices/[id]\)
- Create invoice page \(/dashboard/admin/invoices/new\)
- Client invoices page \(/dashboard/client/invoices\)
- Client profile page with analytics \(/dashboard/admin/clients/[id]\)
- Clients list page \(/dashboard/admin/clients\)
- InvoiceStatusBadge component
- AnalyticsService frontend for metrics

PHASE 6: Notifications & Final Polish
Backend:
- NotificationsService with INFO, SUCCESS, WARNING, ERROR types
- Real-time notification triggers
Frontend:
- NotificationBell component with dropdown
- Mark as read functionality
- Notification navigation
- useNotifications hook

Additional Improvements:
- Fixed missing dependencies \(@headlessui/react, @heroicons/react, react-hot-toast\)
- Fixed import paths \(api service\)
- Fixed TypeScript errors in FileModalsGroup
- Added UsersService frontend with getClients method
- Added FilesService frontend
- Added TrackingService frontend
- Currency utility functions
- Enhanced Project Workflow Section with all modals

Frontend Build: ✓ Successful
All Routes Working:
- /dashboard/admin/clients
- /dashboard/admin/clients/[id]
- /dashboard/admin/invoices
- /dashboard/admin/invoices/[id]
- /dashboard/admin/invoices/new
- /dashboard/client/invoices
- /dashboard/projects/[id]/feedback
- /dashboard/projects/[id]/payments

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
